visualizerParams.title: Chebyshev Distance Metric Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The Chebyshev distance calculation is incorrect. It seems to be calculating the Euclidean distance or some other metric instead of the maximum coordinate difference. Identify and fix the logic flaw.

solution.explanation: Chebyshev distance is defined as the MAXIMUM absolute difference between any coordinate of two points (`max(|x1-x2|, |y1-y2|, ...)`). The buggy code used `sum()`, which implements the Manhattan (L1) distance.
